title: Teleshopping
desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Lockdown Wedding
desc: A frugal insurance agent hosts his in-laws as they are stuck at his house during the COVID-19 pandemic. However, he struggles to accommodate their luxurious lifestyle.

title: Sardaar Gabbar Singh
desc: The kingdom of Rathanpur is forced to face the wrath of Bhairav Singh, who unceremoniously usurps their land. They later find respite when Gabbar Singh, a brave policeman, takes on their oppressor.

title: Singh Saab the Great
desc: Singh Saab is a responsible tax collector who believes in honesty, but Bhoodev, a conniving man, plots against him. Singh adopts a unique way to teach Bhoodev a lesson.

title: Divya Shakti
desc: A young reporter, Prashant Verma, tired of injustice, bears witness to a murder case and wages war against Tau. But in the process, his life and family members get threatened.

title: Suriya
desc: An honest and uncompromising DCP takes on a businessman and his goons who are involved in illegal dumping of toxic waste and causing serious health concerns.
